- Source branch: `feature/*` / `bugfix/*` / `hotfix/*` / `release/*`
- Target branch: `develop` / `main`

## Security Check

- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] No unnecessary open ports / insecure config added
- [ ] Input validation / auth impact reviewed if relevant

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No deployment change

- [ ] Requires database migration

- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
